privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Warranta is a privacy-first vault for your receipts, warranties and return windows. It is built so that everything you add stays on your device. This policy explains, in plain language, what data is involved and how it is handled.

sections.p: None. Warranta requires no account and does not collect, transmit, sell, or share your personal data. Your items, photos, documents, prices and notes never leave your device except within your own device backup (see “Storage & backup”).

When you scan a receipt or warranty, the text is read and the fields are filled in using Apple’s on-device Vision framework and on-device intelligence. The image and its text are processed entirely on your iPhone and are never uploaded to us or to any third party.

The only network activity is with Apple’s App Store, for purchases and subscriptions. If you buy Warranta Pro, an optional registration may send a single anonymous Apple transaction identifier so your subscription can be recognised — it contains no name, email, or item content. Warranta includes no analytics, advertising, or tracking SDKs of any kind, and shows no ads.

Warranta may ask for Camera (to photograph a receipt or warranty), Photo Library (to pick an existing image), and Notifications (to remind you before a warranty or return window expires). Each permission is optional, requested only when needed, and used solely for the stated purpose.

Your data is stored locally on your device. If you have iCloud device backup enabled, your Warranta data is included in that encrypted Apple backup under your own Apple account. We operate no servers that hold your content, and we cannot see your data.

You are always in control. You can edit or delete any item inside the app at any time, and deleting the app removes all of its data from your device. Because we do not hold your personal data on any server, there is nothing for us to access, export, correct, or erase on your behalf — rights under the GDPR, UK GDPR, and CCPA/CPRA are satisfied by design.

The only third party involved is Apple, which processes App Store purchases and subscriptions and provides iCloud backup. Those interactions are governed by Apple’s own Privacy Policy at apple.com/legal/privacy. Warranta integrates no other third-party services, advertising networks, or data brokers.
Your data remains on your device for as long as you keep it and is deleted when you delete it or remove the app. We retain nothing, because we never receive your content in the first place.
Because all processing happens on your device, your content is not transferred to us or moved across borders. Wherever you use Warranta, your data stays with you.
Warranta is not directed at children under 13 and collects no personal data from anyone, including children.
We may update this policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on this page with a new “last updated” date; your continued use after an update means you accept the revised policy.
Questions about privacy? Email mustafaagulden@gmail.com and we will be glad to help.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms of Service (“Terms”) govern your use of the Warranta app. By downloading or using Warranta, you agree to these Terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the app.

sections.p: Warranta helps you store proof of purchase and keep track of warranty and return windows. It is an organisational tool only: it does not provide, extend, underwrite, or honour any warranty, and its reminders are provided on a best-effort basis and may be delayed or missed for reasons outside our control. Always confirm important dates and terms directly with the seller or manufacturer.

You may use Warranta only if you can form a binding contract under the law that applies to you, and you are of the age of majority in your country or use the app under the supervision of a parent or legal guardian.

We grant you a personal, non-exclusive, non-transferable, revocable licence to use Warranta for your own personal, non-commercial purposes, subject to these Terms and to Apple’s Licensed Application End User Licence Agreement (the standard EULA at apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula).

You agree to use Warranta lawfully and not to resell, rent, or redistribute it, nor to copy, modify, reverse engineer, or attempt to extract its source code except to the limited extent that applicable law expressly permits despite this restriction.

Warranta Pro is offered as auto-renewing subscriptions and, where available, a one-time purchase, all processed by the App Store. Payment is charged to your Apple ID. Subscriptions renew automatically unless cancelled at least 24 hours before the end of the current period. Any free trial converts to a paid subscription unless cancelled before it ends. You can manage or cancel in your App Store account settings. Prices may vary by region and are shown before purchase.

These Terms are between you and the developer of Warranta, not Apple, and Apple is not responsible for the app or its content. Apple has no obligation to provide any maintenance or support for the app. To the maximum extent permitted by law, Apple has no warranty obligation, and any claims, losses, liabilities, or costs attributable to the app are the developer’s responsibility, not Apple’s. Apple and its subsidiaries are third-party beneficiaries of these Terms and may enforce them against you.

Warranta is provided “as is” and “as available”, without warranties of any kind, whether express or implied. We do not guarantee that reminders will be delivered on time, that scanned data will be accurate, or that the app will be uninterrupted or error-free.

To the maximum extent permitted by law, we are not liable for any missed warranty or return deadline, lost data, or indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of Warranta. Nothing in these Terms limits or excludes liability that cannot be limited or excluded under the mandatory law of your country.
Warranta, its name, design, and content are owned by the developer and protected by applicable intellectual-property law. Your own items, photos, and documents remain entirely yours.

This licence continues until terminated. It ends automatically if you breach these Terms in a material way, and you may end it at any time by uninstalling the app. Provisions that by their nature should survive termination — such as disclaimers, limitation of liability, and intellectual-property terms — will continue to apply.

We may update these Terms from time to time. Material changes will be posted on this page with a new “last updated” date. Continued use of Warranta after changes take effect means you accept the updated Terms.

These Terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Türkiye, without prejudice to any mandatory consumer-protection rights you are entitled to under the law of your country of residence, which continue to apply.
Questions about these Terms? Email mustafaagulden@gmail.com.
